intent_head: Find the next birthday from the visible people. If several birthdays land on the same next date, list all matching names. Return only the exact names, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

details: Find the next birthday from the visible people. If several birthdays land on the same next date, list all matching names. Return only the exact names, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

next_step.current_state: Search identified birthday-bearing cast files. Relative to 2026-03-31, the nearest upcoming birthday in the search results is 1981-04-25 from claudia.md; next closest is 2017-04-26 from ida.md. I need the canonical file for the exact name before answering.

next_step.current_state: I have sufficient evidence: authoritative cast search and canonical file read confirm the next upcoming birthday after today's date belongs to Claudia Reiter.
next_step.observation: Read 10_entities/cast/claudia.md and confirmed the exact canonical name is Claudia Reiter with birthday 1981-04-25.

function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap: tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context. Inspected 99_system per root rule, then used authoritative cast records for birthdays and canonical name resolution.
function.outcome_justification: Authoritative rules in AGENTS.MD and 10_entities/cast/AGENTS.MD say cast files are authoritative for birthdays. Search across visible cast records showed the earliest upcoming birthday after today is in 10_entities/cast/claudia.md, and that canonical file gives the exact name Claudia Reiter.
